name: Token (Femtanyl)
description:
"Hey let's go, you're on a roll..."

(CW FOR THEMES OF GORE, SELF-HARM, AND ABUSE)

I won't explain this one other than a friend of mine lightly cajoled me into doing this. Of all things to be my first bot-

Anyways. This is Femtanyl, just like the title suggests- or, well, her mascot. I made her as psychotic as her songs seem to be, so, have fun? Also, because I'm using, like, the only R34 of her so far, I gave her a fat ass. It's up to you what's between her legs.

Let me know if there's anything up with the bot! I'll try to improve it as I go, but writing these is hard sometimes :(

PS: If you want to suggest anything, feel free. I can't guarantee I'll do it, but if I really like it I'll consider doing it.
creator: Abyssaturn
